# Technical Blog Starter

Use this when drafting a blog-style write-up of a technical change, experiment, or lesson.

```markdown
# [Title that states the value]

[Opening problem, observation, or question.]

## Context

[Why this matters now.]

## What we changed

[Summary of the approach.]

## What we learned

- [Lesson]
- [Tradeoff]

## Further reading

- [Link or next step]
```
